author: Haoshan Hong
text: This is the most practical way ordinary people can use Obsidian with AI. The point is not to collect notes, but to support thinking, writing, and work.

author: Karpathy
text: A maintained wiki is more useful than re-answering from raw notes every time. You want knowledge compilation, not just retrieval.

author: Open Source Builder
text: Local agent workflows get much more useful when reflection and memory promotion happen automatically after reading a feed.
